50601.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
50601.description: Erin Burnett stays ahead of the headlines, delivering a show that's in-depth and informative.

50602.title: Anderson Cooper 360
50602.description: Anderson Cooper goes beyond the headlines to tell stories from many points of view, so you can make up your own mind about the news.

50603.title: Don Lemon Tonight
50603.description: Don Lemon brings you the biggest stories, newsmakers and spirited conversations of the day.

50604.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
50604.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

50605.title: World Sport
50605.description: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

50606.title: CNN Newsroom with John Vause
50606.description: Live from Atlanta, John Vause brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

50607.title: World Sport
50607.description: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

50608.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
50608.description: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

50609.title: Early Start
50609.description: Get a jump on the day's news with Christine Romans and Laura Jarrett.

50610.title: New Day
50610.description: John Berman and Brianna Keilar report the latest news and top stories.

50611.title: World Sport
50611.description: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

50612.title: First Move with Julia Chatterley
50612.description: Get a head start on what's moving the business agenda with Julia Chatterley live from the floor of the New York Stock Exchange.

50613.title: Connect the World
50613.description: Connect the World takes viewers on a sweeping journey across continents, beyond headlines and into the stories changing our world.

50614.title: World Sport
50614.description: A comprehensive review of sports news from around the world, including all the key highlights, profiles and interviews with the newsmakers and stars of sport.

50615.title: Connect the World
50615.description: Connect the World takes viewers on a sweeping journey across continents, beyond headlines and into the stories changing our world.

50616.title: One World with Zain Asher
50616.description: One World with Zain Asher offers a fresh and inclusive take on the top stories from Africa, Europe and beyond, giving every continent an equal voice.

50617.title: Inside Africa
50617.description: From superbikes to racecars, some of South Africa's fastest men and women on wheels provide an inside look at what life is like on, and off, the track.

50618.title: Amanpour
50618.description: Christiane Amanpour provides her powerful interview skills and provocative analysis on global stories that matter to you.

50619.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
50619.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

50620.title: Quest Means Business
50620.description: Richard Quest presides over a cast of experts and correspondents to deliver unrivaled facts, figures and analysis from the business world, a nightly wealth check.

50621.title: Africa Avant Garde
50621.description: We hear from some of the continent's most experimental contemporary artists, including acclaimed Nigerian visual artist Victor Ehikhamenor.

50622.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
50622.description: Jake Tapper covers all the day's top stories around the country and the globe, from politics to money, sports to popular culture.

56961.title: The Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer
56961.description: Wolf Blitzer is in the command center for breaking news, politics and extraordinary reports from around the world.
